info.name: Swap Exodus - 按兑换类型（Quote+Build）
info.description: Exodus 跨链测试（询价+构建一体）。每条用例先 quote 再 build。\n\n账户地址与代币合约请在集合变量维护（userAddress_* / token_USDC_* / token_USDT_*），以 docs/qa/rules/swap-network-features.md 为准。

exec: * Exodus 主币<>主币: quote -> quoteResultCtx -> build-tx

const testCases = [{"name": "Ethereum → BSC (ETH → BNB)", "quoteParams": {"fromTokenAddress": "", "toTokenAddress": "", "fromTokenAmount": "0.1", "fromNetworkId": "evm--1", "toNetworkId": "evm--56", "protocol": "Swap", "userAddress": "0x99f2c780ffCF94f6Fb5B8C38c6cFaE7E12b0d0B0", "slippagePercentage": "0.5", "autoSlippage": "true", "receivingAddress": "0x99f2c780ffCF94f6Fb5B8C38c6cFaE7E12b0d0B0", "kind": "sell", "toTokenAmount": "", "denySingleSwapProvider": ""}, "buildBase": {"fromTokenAddress": "", "toTokenAddress": "", "fromNetworkId": "evm--1", "toNetworkId": "evm--56"}, "userAddr": "0x99f2c780ffCF94f6Fb5B8C38c6cFaE7E12b0d0B0", "recvAddr": "0x99f2c780ffCF94f6Fb5B8C38c6cFaE7E12b0d0B0"}, {"name": "BSC → Avalanche (BNB → AVAX)", "quoteParams": {"fromTokenAddress": "", "toTokenAddress": "", "fromTokenAmount": "1", "fromNetworkId": "evm--56", "toNetworkId": "evm--43114", "protocol": "Swap", "userAddress": "0x99f2c780ffCF94f6Fb5B8C38c6cFaE7E12b0d0B0", "slippagePercentage": "0.5", "autoSlippage": "true", "receivingAddress": "0x99f2c780ffCF94f6Fb5B8C38c6cFaE7E12b0d0B0", "kind": "sell", "toTokenAmount": "", "denySingleSwapProvider": ""}, "buildBase": {"fromTokenAddress": "", "toTokenAddress": "", "fromNetworkId": "evm--56", "toNetworkId": "evm--43114"}, "userAddr": "0x99f2c780ffCF94f6Fb5B8C38c6cFaE7E12b0d0B0", "recvAddr": "0x99f2c780ffCF94f6Fb5B8C38c6cFaE7E12b0d0B0"}, {"name": "Solana → BTC (SOL → BTC)", "quoteParams": {"fromTokenAddress": "", "toTokenAddress": "", "fromTokenAmount": "1", "fromNetworkId": "sol--101", "toNetworkId": "btc--0", "protocol": "Swap", "userAddress": "5UCR1u65cKhcJCnuaRxXy9zFYXnRBZ9ArYmGah6sEB52", "slippagePercentage": "0.5", "autoSlippage": "true", "receivingAddress": "bc1ph7kashckclw7krcat6um7xlvvms4rsnpv2962av4pkdhw9sm08xqlm4nlc", "kind": "sell", "toTokenAmount": "", "denySingleSwapProvider": ""}, "buildBase": {"fromTokenAddress": "", "toTokenAddress": "", "fromNetworkId": "sol--101", "toNetworkId": "btc--0"}, "userAddr": "5UCR1u65cKhcJCnuaRxXy9zFYXnRBZ9ArYmGah6sEB52", "recvAddr": "bc1ph7kashckclw7krcat6um7xlvvms4rsnpv2962av4pkdhw9sm08xqlm4nlc"}, {"name": "Solana → Avalanche (SOL → AVAX)", "quoteParams": {"fromTokenAddress": "", "toTokenAddress": "", "fromTokenAmount": "1", "fromNetworkId": "sol--101", "toNetworkId": "evm--43114", "protocol": "Swap", "userAddress": "5UCR1u65cKhcJCnuaRxXy9zFYXnRBZ9ArYmGah6sEB52", "slippagePercentage": "0.5", "autoSlippage": "true", "receivingAddress": "0x99f2c780ffCF94f6Fb5B8C38c6cFaE7E12b0d0B0", "kind": "sell", "toTokenAmount": "", "denySingleSwapProvider": ""}, "buildBase": {"fromTokenAddress": "", "toTokenAddress": "", "fromNetworkId": "sol--101", "toNetworkId": "evm--43114"}, "userAddr": "5UCR1u65cKhcJCnuaRxXy9zFYXnRBZ9ArYmGah6sEB52", "recvAddr": "0x99f2c780ffCF94f6Fb5B8C38c6cFaE7E12b0d0B0"}, {"name": "Solana → Ethereum (SOL → ETH)", "quoteParams": {"fromTokenAddress": "", "toTokenAddress": "", "fromTokenAmount": "1", "fromNetworkId": "sol--101", "toNetworkId": "evm--1", "protocol": "Swap", "userAddress": "5UCR1u65cKhcJCnuaRxXy9zFYXnRBZ9ArYmGah6sEB52", "slippagePercentage": "0.5", "autoSlippage": "true", "receivingAddress": "0x99f2c780ffCF94f6Fb5B8C38c6cFaE7E12b0d0B0", "kind": "sell", "toTokenAmount": "", "denySingleSwapProvider": ""}, "buildBase": {"fromTokenAddress": "", "toTokenAddress": "", "fromNetworkId": "sol--101", "toNetworkId": "evm--1"}, "userAddr": "5UCR1u65cKhcJCnuaRxXy9zFYXnRBZ9ArYmGah6sEB52", "recvAddr": "0x99f2c780ffCF94f6Fb5B8C38c6cFaE7E12b0d0B0"}, {"name": "Solana → Polygon (SOL → MATIC)", "quoteParams": {"fromTokenAddress": "", "toTokenAddress": "", "fromTokenAmount": "1", "fromNetworkId": "sol--101", "toNetworkId": "evm--137", "protocol": "Swap", "userAddress": "5UCR1u65cKhcJCnuaRxXy9zFYXnRBZ9ArYmGah6sEB52", "slippagePercentage": "0.5", "autoSlippage": "true", "receivingAddress": "0x99f2c780ffCF94f6Fb5B8C38c6cFaE7E12b0d0B0", "kind": "sell", "toTokenAmount": "", "denySingleSwapProvider": ""}, "buildBase": {"fromTokenAddress": "", "toTokenAddress": "", "fromNetworkId": "sol--101", "toNetworkId": "evm--137"}, "userAddr": "5UCR1u65cKhcJCnuaRxXy9zFYXnRBZ9ArYmGah6sEB52", "recvAddr": "0x99f2c780ffCF94f6Fb5B8C38c6cFaE7E12b0d0B0"}];

function buildQuery(params){ return Object.entries(params).filter(function(kv){ return kv[1]!==undefined&&kv[1]!==null; }).map(function(kv){ return encodeURIComponent(kv[0])+'='+encodeURIComponent(String(kv[1])); }).join('&'); }

function runCase(i){ if(i>=testCases.length){ console.log('done'); return; } var c=testCases[i]; var n=c.name; pm.sendRequest({ url:QUOTE_URL+'?'+buildQuery(c.quoteParams), method:'GET', header:Object.entries(quoteHeaders).map(function(e){ return { key:e[0], value:String(e[1]) }; }) }, function(err,res){ if(err){ pm.test('['+n+'] quote 请求失败', function(){ pm.expect.fail(err.toString()); }); runCase(i+1); return; } var code=res.code||res.status; pm.test('['+n+'] quote HTTP 200', function(){ pm.expect(code).to.equal(200); }); var j=res.json(); pm.test('['+n+'] quote 业务码 0', function(){ pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); }); var d=Array.isArray(j.data)?j.data:[]; var providers=d.map(function(x){ return (x&&x.info&&x.info.provider) || (x&&x.provider) || ''; }).filter(Boolean); var ex=d.find(function(x){ var p1=x&&x.info&&String(x.info.provider||''); var p2=x&&String(x.provider||''); return p1==='SwapExodusBridge'||p2==='SwapExodusBridge'||p1.toLowerCase().includes('exodus')||p2.toLowerCase().includes('exodus'); }); pm.test('['+n+'] 命中 Exodus 报价', function(){ if(!ex){ pm.expect.fail('providers='+JSON.stringify(providers)); } pm.expect(ex).to.be.ok; }); if(!ex){ runCase(i+1); return; } var ctx=(ex&&ex.quoteResultCtx) || (ex&&ex.info&&ex.info.quoteResultCtx) || null; pm.test('['+n+'] quoteResultCtx 存在', function(){ if(!ctx){ pm.expect.fail('exodusQuote='+JSON.stringify(ex)); } pm.expect(ctx).to.be.ok; }); if(!ctx){ runCase(i+1); return; } var toAmt=ex.toAmount||c.buildBase.toTokenAmount||'0'; var body=Object.assign({}, c.buildBase, { fromTokenAmount:c.quoteParams.fromTokenAmount, toTokenAmount:String(toAmt), protocol:'Swap', provider:'SwapExodusBridge', userAddress:c.userAddr, receivingAddress:c.recvAddr, slippagePercentage:0.5, kind:'sell', walletType:'hd', quoteResultCtx:ctx }); pm.sendRequest({ url:BUILD_URL, method:'POST', header:Object.entries(buildHeaders).map(function(e){ return { key:e[0], value:String(e[1]) }; }), body:{ mode:'raw', raw:JSON.stringify(body) } }, function(err2,res2){ if(err2){ pm.test('['+n+'] build 请求失败', function(){ pm.expect.fail(err2.toString()); }); runCase(i+1); return; } var code2=res2.code||res2.status; pm.test('['+n+'] build HTTP 200', function(){ pm.expect(code2).to.equal(200); }); if(code2===200){ var j2=res2.json(); pm.test('['+n+'] build 业务码 0', function(){ pm.expect(j2.code).to.eql(0); }); pm.test('['+n+'] build data 存在', function(){ pm.expect(j2.data).to.be.ok; }); } runCase(i+1); }); }); }
* Exodus 主币<>代币：跨链多网络（Quote + Build）

}); var j=res.json(); pm.test('['+n+'] quote 业务码 0', function(){ pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); }); var d=Array.isArray(j.data)?j.data:[]; var providers=d.map(function(x){ return (x&&x.info&&x.info.provider) || (x&&x.provider) || ''; }).filter(Boolean); var ex=d.find(function(x){ var p1=x&&x.info&&String(x.info.provider||''); var p2=x&&String(x.provider||''); return p1==='SwapExodusBridge'||p2==='SwapExodusBridge'||p1.toLowerCase().includes('exodus')||p2.toLowerCase().includes('exodus'); pm.test('['+n+'] quoteResultCtx 存在', function(){ if(!ctx){ pm.expect.fail('exodusQuote='+JSON.stringify(ex)); } pm.expect(ctx).to.be.ok; }); if(!ctx){ runCase(i+1); return; } var toAmt=ex.toAmount||c.buildBase.toTokenAmount||'0'; var body=Object.assign({}, c.buildBase, { fromTokenAmount:c.quoteParams.fromTokenAmount, toTokenAmount:String(toAmt), protocol:'Swap', provider:'SwapExodusBridge', userAddress:c.userAddr, receivingAddress:c.recvAddr, slippagePercentage:0.5, kind:'sell', walletType:'hd', quoteResultCtx:ctx }); pm.sendRequest({ url:BUILD_URL, method:'POST', header:Object.entries(buildHeaders).map(function(e){ return { key:e[0], value:String(e[1]) }; }), body:{ mode:'raw', raw:JSON.stringify(body) } }, function(err2,res2){ if(err2){ pm.test('['+n+'] build 请求失败', function(){ pm.expect.fail(err2.toString()); }); pm.test('['+n+'] build data 存在', function(){ pm.expect(j2.data).to.be.ok; }); } runCase(i+1); }); }); }
